title: BEM-798 inspect placement
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:24 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
route=load('governance/state/bem797_execute_after_dispatch_processor_diagnosis.json')
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
lines=runner.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines() if runner.exists() else []
positions=[]
for i,l in enumerate(lines, start=1):
    if 'Process workflow dispatch queue' in l or 'Commit workflow dispatch queue results' in l or 'Complete job' in l or 'Commit result' in l:
        positions.append({'line':i,'text':l.strip()})
# Also capture context around process step.
ctx=[]
for pos in positions:
    if 'Process workflow dispatch queue' in pos['text']:
        start=max(1,pos['line']-5); end=min(len(lines),pos['line']+12)
        ctx=['%s: %s'%(n,lines[n-1]) for n in range(start,end+1)]
status='placement_inspected'
next_action='if queue step is after job end or malformed, rewrite codex-runner section; else force result-marker script to prove execution'
state={'bem':'BEM-798','status':status,'previous_route':route.get('status'),'positions':positions,'process_context':ctx,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem798_inspect_codex_runner_queue_step_placement.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem798_inspect_codex_runner_queue_step_placement.md').write_text('# BEM-798 | Inspect Codex Runner Queue Step Placement | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem798_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-798'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem798_inspect_codex_runner_queue_step_placement.json','governance/reports/bem798_inspect_codex_runner_queue_step_placement.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem798_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Inspected codex-runner queue processor step placement and captured context')
"""
No issue comments.
